response:
```sql
SELECT s.name, s.capacity
FROM stadiums s
JOIN concerts c ON s.stadium_id = c.stadium_id
WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM c.concert_date) > 2013
GROUP BY s.stadium_id, s.name, s.capacity
HAVING COUNT(*) = (
    SELECT MAX(cnt)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt
        FROM stadiums s2
        JOIN concerts c2 ON s2.stadium_id = c2.stadium_id
        WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM c2.concert_date) > 2013
        GROUP BY s2.stadium_id
    ) sub
);
```
